channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Recent polling data presents challenges for Democrats regarding Platner
Trump says US military eliminated 'infamous' Tren de Aragua leader in lethal strike
item.description: President Donald Trump announced a U.S. military strike that killed Tren de Aragua leader NiÃ±o Guerrero, calling it retribution for victims of violent...

item.title: WATCH: House Dems blame racism, 'all-White' jury for Karmelo Anthony's guilty verdict
item.description: House Democrats claim the Karmelo Anthony guilty verdict highlights racism in the criminal justice system, citing concerns about jury selection and ra...

item.title: Sen. Rick Scott Ends Hold on Coast Guard Promotions
item.description: Sen. Rick Scott, R-Fla., announced Thursday he was lifting his hold on Coast Guard promotions that had lasted two months.
